text:
Pulling the trigger on ordering 8xh100s for TrustedSec. The inconsistencies on frontier models plus how deep we are going with research is a must. 

Now I’ll have my own dedicated coding system. Excited ! 

Maybe I’ll share with @HackingLZ and @cantcomputer ..
